title: FabFinds Oil Burner Pearlised Iridescent Oil Burners for Wax Melts Ceramic Burner + 8PC Wax Melts
features: New innovation Design: Unique pool effect design allowing the fragrance to diffuse slowly and evenly. Also, allowing easy removal of leftover wax.
Iridescent Surface Finish: Classy iridescent surface finish that will look great in your home and suit any room.
High Quality: Made with top quality ceramic material that is suitable for wax melt, Wax tart and essential oils. Also, easy to remove leftover wax
Ideal Gift: Our Teardrop Pearlised oil burner is perfect gift for friends, family and loved ones for special occasions.
Product Specification: Teardrop Pearlised Oil x1 (H 14cm X W16cm) (approx.). Comes securely packed in box.
description: Product description Who doesn't love putting on your favourite wax melt after a long day? Shop these beautiful oil burners, perfect for adding to your home and enjoying some gorgeous wax melt scents. Designed in two different stylish colourways, with an interesting iridescent surface finish, these oil burners would also make a fabulous gift for someone or would look great in your home. Directions [IN] The product should be used by placing a wax melt or essential oil in the burner and then lighting a candle underneath.
